scripts.gen:proto:ui: mkdir -p frontend/src/gen && protoc --plugin=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-es --plugin=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-connect-es -I . --es_out frontend/src/gen --es_opt target=ts,import_extension=.js --connect-es_out frontend/src/gen --connect-es_opt target=ts,import_extension=.js proto/health/v1/health.proto proto/agentcompose/v1/agentcompose.proto proto/agentcompose/v2/agentcompose.proto
